info.title: Quicky API
info.description: API documentation for the Quicky — a microservice-based freelance exchange platform. All endpoints are proxied through the API Gateway at `localhost:8080`.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Aggregated user profile with recent orders

tags.name: Offers
tags.description: Offer negotiation between masters and customers

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Real-time chat via WebSocket + REST fallback

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Push notifications via WebSocket and email

get.description: Returns the health status of the API Gateway. Always public.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Rate-limited to 5 requests per minute per IP.
Authenticates a user and sets access_token/refresh_token cookies. Rate-limited to 5 requests per minute per IP.
Issues a new access_token using the refresh_token cookie.

delete.description: Invalidates the refresh token and clears authentication cookies.

get.description: Confirms a user's email using a verification token sent via email.
Returns the authenticated user's full profile aggregated with their recent orders. Requires authentication.
Returns a user's full profile. Accessible by the user themselves or admin.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields. Only the requesting user or admin can update.

post.description: Enables the master role for the specified user, allowing them to create master profiles and send offers.

delete.description: Removes the master role from the specified user.

get.description: Returns a master's public profile including rating and completed orders count.

patch.description: Updates the master profile for the authenticated user. Only the profile owner or admin can update.

post.description: Creates a new order in the system. Publishes an `order.created` event to Kafka.

get.description: Returns a filtered, paginated list of orders. Supports filtering by status, category, and customer.
Returns a single order by its UUID.

post.description: Изменяет статус заказа. Следует переходам конечного автомата: created→{negotiation,assigned,cancelled}, negotiation→{assigned,cancelled}, assigned→{in_progress,cancelled}, in_progress→{completed,cancelled}. Требуется роль admin, moderator или назначенного мастера.

patch.description: Изменяет статус заказа. Следует переходам конечного автомата: created→{negotiation,assigned,cancelled}, negotiation→{assigned,cancelled}, assigned→{in_progress,cancelled}, in_progress→{completed,cancelled}. Требуется роль admin, moderator или назначенного мастера.

post.description: Cancels an order. Only the customer who created the order or an admin/moderator can cancel.
Marks an order as completed. Only the customer who created the order can complete it.

get.description: Returns the full status change history for an order.
Returns all categories. Can be returned as a flat list or a tree structure. Public endpoint.

parameters.name: tree
parameters.description: Return as a tree structure (nested by parent_id)

post.description: Creates a new order category. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates a category name. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a review for a user after an order is completed. Rating must be 1-5.

get.description: Returns all reviews written about a specific user.

post.description: Files a complaint against a user related to a specific order.

get.description: Returns all complaints. Requires moderator or admin role.

patch.description: Updates the status of a complaint. Requires moderator or admin role.

post.description: A master sends an offer (proposal) for a specific order. Requires master role.

get.description: Returns offers filtered by order_id or master_id.
Returns a single offer with its current status.
Returns all negotiation events for an offer (sent, countered, accepted, rejected, withdrawn).

post.description: The master who made the offer withdraws it. Requires master role and ownership.
The customer accepts a master's offer. This triggers order assignment. Requires customer role and ownership of the order.
The customer rejects a master's offer. Requires customer role and ownership of the order.
The customer makes a counter-offer with a new price. This is part of the negotiation flow. Requires customer role.

get.description: Establishes a WebSocket connection for real-time messaging. Requires a valid JWT token as a query parameter. Supports message types: `message.send`, `typing.start`, `typing.stop`, `messages.read`, `ping`.
Returns all chats for the authenticated user, each with the last message and unread count.

post.description: Creates a new chat between a customer and a master for a specific order. Only one chat per order is allowed.

400.description: Validation error or chat already exists

get.description: Returns a single chat with its participants and metadata.
Returns paginated messages for a chat, ordered by creation time.

post.description: Sends a message in a chat (REST fallback for WebSocket). The sender must be a participant in the chat.
Marks all messages in the chat as read by the authenticated user.
Uploads a file to MinIO S3 storage. Supports images (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF), videos (MP4), and PDFs. Maximum file size: 50 MB.

400.description: Validation error or unsupported file type

get.description: Returns metadata for a file without downloading it.

delete.description: Deletes a file from storage. Only the file owner or admin can delete.

get.description: Returns a presigned URL for downloading the file from MinIO.
Returns a paginated list of files owned by the authenticated user.
Establishes a WebSocket connection to receive real-time push notifications.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User UUID to subscribe for notifications

get.description: Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user.
Returns the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user.

post.description: Marks all notifications for the authenticated user as read.
Marks a single notification as read.

delete.description: Deletes a single notification for the authenticated user.
Permanently deletes a user account. Admin only.

put.description: Updates the status of a complaint. Requires moderator or admin role.

cookieAuth.name: access_token
cookieAuth.description: JWT access token stored in an HTTP-only cookie. Set automatically after login/register.

access_token.description: JWT access token (также устанавливается в HTTP-only cookie)

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token (устанавливается в HTTP-only cookie)

expires_in.description: Время жизни access token в секундах
